Notice Of Application And Hearing For Right To Attach Order - To 405 Howard Street Sf, Llc
Off Calendar Jan-22-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances via CourtCall:
G. Cresswell Templeton III, Esq., (213) 620-0460, appearing for 405 Howard Street SF,
LLC, Defendant
James Swearingen, Esq., (925) 941-3237, appearing for Mixpanel, Plaintiff

ARGUED. Mr. Templeton stated that he contested the tentative ruling and argued to limit the attachment to the security deposit and not include Notel Inc. Mr. Swearingen provided oral argument in support of his position.

The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PLAINTIFF MIXPANEL, INC., A DELAWARE CORPORATION Notice Of Application And Hearing For Right To Attach Order - To 405 Howard Street Sf, Llc is taken under submission. Judge Charles F. Haines, Clerk: N. Wong, Not reported (D501)

Notice Of Application And Hearing For Right To Attach Order - To Knotel, Inc
Off Calendar Jan-22-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances via CourtCall:
G. Cresswell Templeton III, Esq., (213) 620-0460, appearing for 405 Howard Street SF,
LLC, Defendant
James Swearingen, Esq., (925) 941-3237, appearing for Mixpanel, Plaintiff

ARGUED. Mr. Templeton stated that he contested the tentative ruling and requested that the bond amount be at least $1.5 million to be able to cover damages. Mr. Swearingen argued that without a declaration, the application is fatal and provided case background.

The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PLAINTIFF MIXPANEL, INC., A DELAWARE CORPORATION Notice Of Application And Hearing For Right To Attach Order - To Knotel, Inc is taken under submission. Judge Charles F. Haines, Clerk: N. Wong, Not reported (D501)

Notice Of Application And Hearing For Right To Attach Order - As To Defendant Knotel, Inc.
Off Calendar Dec-15-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances by any attorney, any party or any interested party.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF MIXPANEL, INC., A DELAWARE CORPORATION Notice Of Application And Hearing For Right To Attach Order - To Knotel, Inc. is OFF CALENDAR, duplicate entry. Judge Charles F. Haines, Clerk: N. Wong, Not reported (D501)

Notice Of Application And Hearing For Right To Attach Order
Off Calendar Dec-15-2020 Continued To Dec-17-20 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: No appearances by any attorney, any party or any interested party.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF MIXPANEL, INC., A DELAWARE CORPORATION Notice Of Application And Hearing For Right To Attach Order - To Knotel, Inc is continued to December 17, 2020. Opposing party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.7B and provide a courtesy copy of opposition to department 501 no later than 8:00 a.m. on December 16, 2020 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. Judge Charles F. Haines, Clerk: N. Wong, Not reported (D501)

Notice Of Application And Hearing For Right To Attach Order - To 405 Howard Street Sf, Llc
